scripts.dev:backend: uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run --project apps/backend --no-sync uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir apps/backend/app --app-dir apps/backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.lint:backend: uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run --project apps/backend --no-sync ruff check apps/backend
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
